title: thalictrum expansum subsp. virgultorum
intro: Thalictrum expansum subsp. virgultorum, also known as Meadow Rue, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Meadow Rue include relief from arthritis, gout, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Thalictrum expansum subsp. virgultorum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
